title: Wedding Content & A/V Services

faq.question: How does booking work for wedding coverage?
faq.answer: The first step is a conversation about the ceremony, schedule, locations, and what matters most to your family. Once the scope is clear, the right package and coverage plan can be locked in.

faq.question: How fast is delivery after the event?
faq.answer: Delivery timing depends on the package and final edit scope, but the timeline is clarified before booking so expectations are set early and nothing feels vague after the event.

faq.question: Do you handle audio as well as video?
faq.answer: Yes. Wedding coverage can include professional audio support for ceremonies, speeches, and family program moments when the event needs both clean sound and cinematic visuals.

value.name: The Nikkah Essential
